window_label: Discovery mined; OOS+HO one-shot validated; 5-bar realistic-live signal
mode: MTF (Margin Trading Facility) primary; CNC delivery fallback for non-MTF-eligible symbols
mode_history: Original 2026-05-21 lock specified CNC delivery only. Upgraded 2026-05-21 (later same session) to MTF-primary after scraping Zerodha approved-MTF list (data/mtf_universe/approved_mtf_securities_2026-05-21.json) confirmed 88.8% of historical Cell #5 trades are MTF-eligible with mean per-trade leverage 2.79x. CNC retained as fallback for the 11.2% non-MTF symbols.

signal_filters.comment: Brief-level (primary) filter — every signal candidate must meet these BEFORE cell-lock applies. Signal is computed from 5 bars (15:00, 15:05, 15:10, 15:15, 15:20) of the closing window; the 15:25 bar is intentionally EXCLUDED to avoid look-ahead bias (the 15:25 bar's data isn't fully known until 15:30 IST, after which the MOC order has already been placed).
signal_filters._signed_vol_ratio_def: Sigma(volume_i * sign(close_i - open_i)) / Sigma(volume_i) over the 5 signal bars
signal_filters._min_bar_count_def: Require at least 4 of 5 signal bars to be present for the symbol (graceful handling of gaps).

cell_filter.comment: 2D cell mined from Discovery sweep. Cell #5 from confidence framework run.
cell_filter._exclude_etf_reason: ETFs have different EOD microstructure (NAV-vs-market-price arbitrage, not MIS unwind/margin-call cascades). The mechanism story (post-rally retail profit-taking + overnight pre-open recovery) doesn't apply. Exclude at universe-builder level even if ETF appears in MTF approved list (112 ETFs do).

entry_exit_mechanic._entry_execution: Submit Market-on-Close (MOC) CNC BUY order at start of 15:25 bar (i.e., 15:25 IST). Order fills at NSE official closing price (typically the volume-weighted average of last 30 mins per NSE rules, derived from the 15:30 close).
entry_exit_mechanic.entry_price_backtest: close of 15:25 bar (= 15:30 IST market close price)
entry_exit_mechanic._exit_execution: Submit CNC SELL order during pre-open auction window (09:00-09:08 IST). Fills at the pre-open auction equilibrium price (becomes the 09:15 official open).
entry_exit_mechanic.position_holding_hours: ~17-18 hours overnight (Mon-Thu), ~66 hours (Fri close -> Mon open), longer over public holidays
entry_exit_mechanic.no_intraday_management: No SL, no T1, no T2 — single fixed exit at next-day open. Market is closed during the hold period.

stats_5bar_realistic_live._basis: 5-bar signal (15:00-15:20) recomputed in tools/sub9_research/sanity_close_dn_overnight_5bar.py to eliminate the look-ahead bias of the original 6-bar (15:00-15:25) sanity. These numbers reflect what live execution would actually produce.

stats_6bar_lookahead_inflated._basis: Original 6-bar (15:00-15:25) sanity. NOT FOR EXECUTION DECISIONS — these numbers include look-ahead bias because the 15:25 bar isn't fully known when the MOC order is placed. Kept here as a diagnostic.

regime_breakdown_5bar._basis: Pooled D+OOS+HO trades segmented by assets/regime_schema.yaml

decay_warning._basis: Yearly aggregates show edge degradation; the war_vol_2026 regime PF (0.96) is essentially fee-floor.
decay_warning.interpretation: Edge appears to be decaying — likely from more market participants discovering the pattern or from regulatory/microstructure shifts. Forward expectation should NOT assume the headline pooled PF=2.44 will hold; conservative forward estimate is PF 1.3-1.6.
decay_warning.tripwire: Pause live execution if rolling 30-trade PF (live or paper) drops below 1.20 sustained for 6 weeks

fee_model.comment: Two-mode fee model. Universe builder routes each symbol to MTF (if in approved list and not ETF) or CNC fallback (otherwise). PnL analytics tracks both modes.

round_trip_fee_breakdown_per_notional._brokerage_alt: or 0.3% per executed MTF order (whichever lower) per Zerodha rate card

fee_model.fee_helper_status: LOCAL ONLY in tools/sub9_research/sanity_close_dn_overnight_long.py:calc_fee_cnc. MTF fee helper NOT yet implemented. Both need promotion to tools/sub7_validation/build_per_setup_pnl.py before live wiring (paper-trade Task 1).

mtf_eligibility.refresh_cadence: weekly recommended (list updates daily but slowly per Zerodha)

capital_allocation_plan._cushion_reason: Margin variability buffer — Zerodha can raise margin requirements daily; cushion absorbs without forced liquidation
capital_allocation_plan._max_new_reason: User-imposed risk cap. With 2-day capital cycle, peak active slots = 4 (today's 2 open + yesterday's 2 in T1 settlement). Matches 4 active slots exactly.
capital_allocation_plan._capture_rate_basis: HO 5-bar shows 3-4 signals/day median; 2/day cap captures ~75% of fires. Higher-conviction days (multi-symbol clusters) lose some fires.

forward_return_projections.comment: Three scenarios at the user-locked Rs 5L allocation. Per-trade nets factor in the 2.79x mean MTF leverage on eligible trades plus CNC for non-MTF fallback.

per_day_footprint.comment: Historical footprint figures stand. With MTF (avg 2.79x leverage), the notional per Rs 1L margin is Rs 2.79L. The user-locked allocation (4 slots, 2/day cap) trims this from 10 concurrent positions max down to 4 — see capital_allocation_plan.

methodology_notes.anti_salvage_compliance: Pre-registered 4-dim dim_pool (cap_segment, signed_vol_ratio_bin, closing_30m_volume_z_bin, prior_day_return_bin) in specs/2026-05-21-brief-close_dn_overnight_long.md. Cell #5 was selected from 58 ship-eligible cells with per-day median <= 10 via cross-window scan with all-gates-pass filter. Harvey-Liu haircut at M=58.
methodology_notes.lookahead_bias_corrected: Original 6-bar signal used the 15:25 bar (which only fully closes at 15:30 IST — same time the entry order fills). 5-bar signal recomputation excludes the 15:25 bar, restricting signal info to bars known BEFORE the MOC order is submitted. This is the realistic-live signal.
methodology_notes.stationarity_gate_failed: max-min PF across (Disc 3.99, OOS 2.16, HO 1.52) = 2.47, exceeds the pre-registered 0.30 ceiling. The mechanism is genuine but Discovery was the abnormally-strong window (likely post-COVID retail-trading boom regime). OOS and HO PFs are consistent with each other (delta 0.64) and confirm forward viability.
methodology_notes.earnings_proximity_dim_dropped: Phase 4 preview showed news_proximity (within_1day_earnings vs clear) did not affect PF in the HO window — earnings filter is unnecessary. Saves us the earnings_calendar infrastructure dependency.

discovery_regime_coverage: 2023-01-02 to 2024-06-30 spans pre_election_calm + the start of election_vol_spike. The other 5 regimes are covered only by OOS+HO one-shots.
